headline: Paramount Skydance WBD Deal Spurs Job Fears And Valuation Questions
summary: Paramount Skydance has agreed to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery (NasdaqGS:WBD) in a transaction valued at $111 billion, creating one of the largest entertainment groups in Hollywood. Labor unions, including the International Brotherhood of Teamsters, are urging the US Justice Department to block the deal unless binding job protections are included. Regulators and industry insiders are focused on potential workforce cuts, integration of brands such as HBO and CNN, and how combined streaming...
